title: CNBC Daily Open: Oil infrastructure under threat as Iran war rages on?
summary_full: Iran's critical oil export hub Kharg Island is now in U.S. President Donald  Trump's sights, with Trump threatening strikes on the island's oil infrastructure.
summary_public: Iran's critical oil export hub Kharg Island is now in U.S. President Donald  Trump's sights, with Trump threatening strikes on the island's oil infrastructure.
